title: The Early Morning
content:
The moon on the one hand, the dawn on the other:
    The moon is my sister, the dawn is my brother.
    The moon on my left and the dawn on my right.
    My brother, good morning: my sister, good night.
meaning: About: Joseph Hilaire Pierre Ren� Belloc was a French-born writer who became a naturalised British subject in 1902. He was one of the most prolific writers in England during the early twentieth century.
